Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Damian\\.claude\\plugins'' -Recurse -Filter ''*.md'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern ''No verified exec'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object -First 5")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Damian\\.openclaw'' -Recurse -Include ''*.md'',''*.txt'',''*.js'',''*.json'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -lt 500KB } | ForEach-Object { $r = Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern ''No verified exec'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Host $_.FullName } } | Select-Object -First 10")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Damian\\.openclaw'' -Recurse -Filter ''*.log'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table FullName, LastWriteTime, Length")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Damian\\.openclaw'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime -First 20")
